nasb.text: For You had cast me into the deep, Into the heart of the seas, And the current engulfed me. All Your breakers and billows passed over me.

esv.text: For you cast me into the deep, into the heart of the seas, and the flood surrounded me; all your waves and your billows passed over me.

cnv.text: 你把我投入深海， 在海洋的深處， 大水環繞我； 你的洪濤、你的波浪，都漫過我。

ccb.text: 你把我抛进深海， 茫茫大海把我吞没， 你的巨浪洪涛淹没我。

csbs.text: 你把我丢入深海，丢入海的最深处； 洪流围绕我， 你的波浪、你的洪涛都漫过我。
